title: T-011 — Cascade Chain 2: Manufacturing_Operation → Intermediate_Code_P/Final + V06
prompt:
# T-011 — Cascade Chain 2 + V06 validation

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §6.1 Chain 2, §12 V06
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
When prod_detail.manufacturing_operation_N changes, look up process_suffix in Reference.ManufacturingOperations and auto-fill prod_detail.intermediate_code_p<N>; then recompute intermediate_code_final and emit V06 warning when last suffix mismatches recipe component last char.

## Implementation contract
New packages/cascade-engine/src/chain2-operations.ts exporting handleOperationChange(prodDetailId, n, newOpName). Reads operation row by name, formats intermediate_code_pN as 'WIP-<suffix>-<seq>', updates row, then computes intermediate_code_final from p1..p4. Emits V06 (severity=WARN per ADR-034) when UCase(last char of recipe_components last component) != UCase(last suffix). Tests assert auto-fill, final composition, and V06 trigger.

## Files
- packages/cascade-engine/src/chain2-operations.ts [create]
- packages/cascade-engine/__tests__/chain2.test.ts [create]
- packages/validation/src/v06-suffix-match.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given prod_detail row with operation 'Mix' configured suffix 'MX', when handleOperationChange runs for n=1, then intermediate_code_p1 starts with 'WIP-MX-'
2. Given p1..p4 filled with WIP-MX, WIP-KN, WIP-PR, WIP-BK, when chain2 recomputes, then intermediate_code_final = 'WIP-MX-KN-PR-BK-<seq>' style per Phase D #10
3. Given recipe_components last component ends with letter 'A' but last suffix is 'B', when validation runs, then V06 returns severity='WARN' with generic mismatch message

## Test strategy
- RED: 3 tests for auto-fill, final composition, V06 mismatch warning
- Run 'pnpm --filter cascade-engine test chain2 && pnpm --filter validation test v06'

## Risk red lines
- Do not hardcode operation suffixes (always read Reference)
- Do not block save on V06 (WARN only)
- Do not regress perf budget

pipeline_inputs.description: Manufacturing_Operation cascade fills intermediate_code_pN + final; emits V06 WARN on suffix mismatch.
pipeline_inputs.details: Cascade reads Reference.ManufacturingOperations.process_suffix per operation, formats WIP-<suffix>-<seq> for pN, recomputes intermediate_code_final, runs V06 mismatch check returning WARN.
